notes: Collection of subsets (def:subset) of A with: blocks nonempty (def:empty-set), pairwise disjoint (def:intersection, def:empty-set), and covering A via union P = A (def:union / def:cover-full). All conditions accounted for. Minor redundancy: the covering condition is stated concretely as union = A (def:union), so def:cover-full overlaps it ('the blocks cover A'); kept as the named covering concept but flag it as prunable if the reviewer prefers minimal deps.
